name: feishu-user-plugin
display_name: Feishu User Plugin for Claude Code
description: All-in-one Feishu plugin for Claude Code & Codex — messaging (with merge_forward expansion + batch_send), docs (image + file blocks read/write), bitable, wiki (full CRUD), drive, OKR (with progress writes), calendar (rea

tools.name: manage_bitable_app
tools.description: Manage a Bitable app. action=create (new app, optional wiki_space_id to attach), copy (duplicate an existing app), get_meta (read app metadata).

tools.name: manage_bitable_table
tools.description: Manage a table inside a Bitable app. action=list, create (with optional initial fields), update (rename), delete.

tools.name: manage_bitable_field
tools.description: Manage fields (columns) inside a Bitable table. action=list, create, update (Feishu requires `type` even when only renaming), delete.

tools.name: manage_bitable_view
tools.description: Manage views inside a Bitable table. action=list, create, delete. (Feishu open API does not expose view update — recreate with a new name to change.)

tools.name: manage_bitable_record
tools.description: Manage records (rows) inside a Bitable table. action=search, get, create, update, delete. create/update/delete accept arrays — single record or up to 500.

tools.name: list_calendars
tools.description: List the current user's calendars (primary + shared + subscribed). Requires UAT — app identity only sees calendars it was explicitly invited to. Requires `calendar:calendar:readonly` scope on the OAut

tools.name: list_calendar_events
tools.description: List events in a calendar within an optional time range. Typical usage: first list_calendars to find calendar_id (primary calendar has type="primary"), then list events in e.g. [now, now+7d] (Unix sec

tools.name: get_calendar_event
tools.description: Get full details of a single calendar event (summary, description, start/end, attendees, location, attachments, meeting link).

tools.name: create_calendar_event
tools.description: Create a new calendar event. Requires `calendar:calendar.event:write` scope (re-run `npx feishu-user-plugin oauth` after enabling). The current identity (UAT-first) must have writer or owner permissio

tools.name: update_calendar_event
tools.description: Patch fields on an existing calendar event. Pass only the fields you want to change. Requires `calendar:calendar.event:write` scope.

tools.name: delete_calendar_event
tools.description: Delete a calendar event. Requires `calendar:calendar.event:write` scope.

tools.name: respond_calendar_event
tools.description: Respond to an event invitation. The current identity must be in the event's attendee list. Requires `calendar:calendar.event:write` scope.

tools.name: get_freebusy
tools.description: Query freebusy windows for one or more users in a time range. Use to find a meeting slot. Requires `calendar:calendar:readonly` (already in default scope set).

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search Feishu users, bots, or group chats by name. Returns IDs.

tools.name: create_p2p_chat
tools.description: Create or get a P2P (direct message) chat. Returns numeric chat_id.

tools.name: get_user_info
tools.description: Look up a user's display name by user ID.

tools.name: get_login_status
tools.description: Check cookie session validity and app credentials status. Also refreshes session.

tools.name: download_message_resource
tools.description: Download an image or file attached to a message so the model can see / store it. v1.3.7 (C2.4) consolidates the v1.3.6 download_image (mode 1) + download_file. UAT-first, falls back to app.

tools.name: download_doc_image
tools.description: Download an image embedded in a docx document so the model can see it. Pass the `image_token` from `get_doc_blocks` (block.image.token), and optionally the doc/wiki/URL token to scope the lookup. UAT-

tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Search Feishu documents by keyword.

tools.name: read_doc
tools.description: Read the raw text content of a Feishu document.

tools.name: get_doc_blocks
tools.description: Get structured block tree of a document. Returns block types, content, and hierarchy for precise document analysis.

tools.name: create_doc
tools.description: Create a new Feishu document. Can place directly under a Wiki space by passing wiki_space_id (optionally wiki_parent_node_token for nested placement) — the plugin creates the doc in drive then attache

tools.name: manage_doc_block
tools.description: Manage content blocks in a document. Single tool replaces v1.3.6 create_doc_block / update_doc_block / delete_doc_blocks.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List files in a Drive folder.

tools.name: create_folder
tools.description: Create a new folder in Drive.

tools.name: upload_drive_file
tools.description: Upload a file from disk to a Feishu Drive folder (drive/v1/files/upload_all, parent_type=explorer). Returns file_token + url. If wiki_space_id is provided, the uploaded file is then attached to that W

tools.name: manage_drive_file
tools.description: Manage a Drive file/doc/folder. action=copy (duplicate to a new name + folder), move (relocate, returns task_id), delete (remove, returns task_id). `type` is always required (Feishu rejects with 10610

tools.name: get_new_events
tools.description: Drain real-time events received since the last call. Currently surfaces "im.message.receive_v1" events (replies, group messages). Returns empty when WS isn't connected or no events have arrived. Use f

tools.name: create_group
tools.description: Create a new group chat (as bot). Can add initial members.

tools.name: update_group
tools.description: Update group chat name or description.

tools.name: list_members
tools.description: List all members in a group chat.

tools.name: manage_members
tools.description: Add or remove members from a group chat. The Feishu API rejects with code 9499 when the IDs in `member_ids` do not match `member_id_type` — pass `member_id_type` explicitly when using union_id or user

tools.name: get_chat_info
tools.description: Get chat details: name, description, member count, owner. Supports both oc_xxx and numeric chat_id.

tools.name: read_p2p_messages
tools.description: Read P2P (direct message) chat history using user_access_token. Works for chats the bot cannot access. Returns newest messages first by default. Auto-expands merge_forward messages into their child me

tools.name: list_user_chats
tools.description: List group chats the user is in. Note: only returns groups, not P2P. For P2P chats, use search_contacts → create_p2p_chat → read_p2p_messages. Requires OAuth setup.

tools.name: list_chats
tools.description: List all chats the bot has joined. Returns chat_id, name, type.

tools.name: read_messages
tools.description: Read message history from any group. Accepts oc_xxx ID, numeric ID, or chat name (auto-searched). Auto-falls back to UAT for external groups the bot cannot access. Returns newest messages first by def

tools.name: send_message_as_bot
tools.description: Send a message as the bot to any chat. Supports text, post, interactive, etc. This is the reliable path for @-mentions: include `<at user_id="ou_xxx">Name</at>` inline in text content and Feishu resol

tools.name: reply_message
tools.description: Reply to a specific message by message_id (as bot). Only works for text messages; other types return error 230054.

tools.name: forward_message
tools.description: Forward a message to another chat or user. `receive_id` may be a group chat_id (oc_xxx), an open_id (ou_xxx), a union_id, a user_id, or an email — set `receive_id_type` to match (default: chat_id).

tools.name: delete_message
tools.description: Recall/delete a message (bot can only delete its own messages).

tools.name: update_message
tools.description: Edit a sent message (bot can only edit its own messages). Feishu supports edit only for `text` and `interactive` (card) messages — other types (post, image, file, etc.) are rejected by the API.

tools.name: pin_message
tools.description: Pin or unpin a message in a chat.

tools.name: add_reaction
tools.description: Add an emoji reaction to a message.

tools.name: delete_reaction
tools.description: Remove an emoji reaction from a message.

tools.name: send_as_user
tools.description: Send a text message as the logged-in Feishu user. Supports reply threading and real @-mentions (triggers push notifications).

tools.name: send_to_user
tools.description: Search user by name → create P2P chat → send text message. All in one step.

tools.name: send_to_group
tools.description: Search group by name → send text message. All in one step.

tools.name: batch_send
tools.description: Send the same or different content to multiple targets in one call. Each target dispatches sequentially with a small delay (anti-rate-limit) and reports per-target success/error. Identity is the cooki

tools.name: send_image_as_user
tools.description: Send an image as the logged-in user. Requires image_key (upload via Official API first).

tools.name: send_file_as_user
tools.description: Send a file as the logged-in user. Requires file_key (upload via Official API first).

tools.name: send_post_as_user
tools.description: Send a rich text (POST) message with title and formatted paragraphs. Supports real @-mentions that trigger notifications.

tools.name: send_card_as_user
tools.description: Send an interactive card to a chat. **Identity defaults to BOT** because user-identity card sending requires reverse-engineering the Feishu web protobuf (deferred to v1.3.9; v1.3.8 shipped the capture

tools.name: list_user_okrs
tools.description: List a user's OKRs. Requires the user's open_id (get yours via get_login_status or search_contacts). Filter by period_ids to narrow to a specific quarter.

tools.name: get_okrs
tools.description: Batch-fetch full OKR details (objectives, key results, progress, alignments) by OKR IDs.

tools.name: list_okr_periods
tools.description: List OKR periods (quarters / years) defined in the tenant. Use period_ids from this to filter list_user_okrs.

tools.name: create_okr_progress_record
tools.description: Add a progress note to an OKR objective or key result. Feishu requires `source_title`, `source_url`, and a block-structured `content`; this tool exposes a simple `content_text` and auto-wraps it into

tools.name: list_okr_progress_records
tools.description: List progress records for an OKR. Feishu has no native list endpoint — this tool calls get_okrs internally and walks the objective_list / kr_list to extract progress_record IDs (with their target_id a

tools.name: delete_okr_progress_record
tools.description: Delete an OKR progress record by its progress_id (from list_okr_progress_records).

tools.name: list_profiles
tools.description: List all available identity profiles (sets of LARK_COOKIE/APP_ID/APP_SECRET/UAT). The "default" profile uses the top-level env vars; additional profiles come from LARK_PROFILES_JSON. Marks the current

tools.name: switch_profile
tools.description: Switch the active identity profile. Subsequent tool calls use the new profile's credentials. Cached client instances are reset so the next call rebuilds against the new creds.

tools.name: manage_profile_hints
tools.description: Inspect / set / clear profileHints — the resourceKey → profileName cache the auto-switch middleware uses to remember which profile owns each Feishu resource. Useful when a hint goes stale (e.g., a pro

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List the current user's tasks. Filter by completion or type.

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Get full details of a single task by GUID.

tools.name: create_task
tools.description: Create a new task. summary is required; due / members / etc. are optional.

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Patch a task. **update_fields** is required by Feishu — list which fields to update (e.g. ["summary","due","completed_at"]).

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Mark a task complete (or uncomplete it). Convenience wrapper around update_task with completed_at.

tools.name: delete_task
tools.description: Permanently delete a task.

tools.name: manage_task_members
tools.description: Add or remove members on a task. Members are objects {id:"<open_id>", role:"assignee"|"follower", type?:"user", name?:""}.

tools.name: upload_image
tools.description: Upload an image file to Feishu. Returns image_key for use with send_image_as_user.

tools.name: upload_file
tools.description: Upload a file to Feishu. Returns file_key for use with send_file_as_user.

tools.name: upload_bitable_attachment
tools.description: Upload a file as a Bitable attachment (drive/v1/medias/upload_all with parent_type=bitable_image or bitable_file). Returns file_token suitable for writing into a Bitable Attachment-type field via batc

tools.name: list_wiki_spaces
tools.description: List all accessible Wiki spaces.

tools.name: search_wiki
tools.description: Search Wiki nodes by keyword.

tools.name: list_wiki_nodes
tools.description: List nodes in a Wiki space.

tools.name: get_wiki_node
tools.description: Resolve a Wiki node token to its underlying object (docx / bitable / sheet / mindnote / file). Returns obj_type + obj_token + space_id so you can read/write the real resource via the usual docx / bita

tools.name: create_wiki_node
tools.description: Create a new Wiki node inside a space. obj_type picks the underlying resource (doc/sheet/bitable/mindnote/file/docx/slides). UAT-first so the resource is owned by the user.

tools.name: update_wiki_node
tools.description: Rename a Wiki node (only `title` is updatable via the wiki API; the underlying resource content is edited via docx/bitable/sheet tools).

tools.name: move_wiki_node
tools.description: Move a Wiki node to a different parent (within the same space) or to a different space. Pass at least one of target_parent_token / target_space_id.

tools.name: copy_wiki_node
tools.description: Deep-copy a Wiki node into a different location (and optionally a different space). Underlying resource is duplicated.

tools.name: delete_wiki_node
tools.description: Delete a Wiki node. Calls `DELETE /open-apis/wiki/v2/spaces/{space_id}/nodes/{node_token}`. The Feishu SDK does not type this endpoint, so the call goes through raw REST (UAT-first; bot fallback uses

environment_variables.name: LARK_COOKIE
environment_variables.description: Feishu web login cookie string (required for user identity messaging)

environment_variables.name: LARK_APP_ID
environment_variables.description: Feishu Open Platform App ID (required for official API)

environment_variables.name: LARK_APP_SECRET
environment_variables.description: Feishu Open Platform App Secret (required for official API)

environment_variables.name: LARK_USER_ACCESS_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: OAuth user_access_token for P2P chat reading (run: node src/oauth.js)

environment_variables.name: LARK_USER_REFRESH_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: OAuth refresh_token for automatic UAT renewal (obtained via OAuth flow)
